text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Bright, the New Year's calligraphy gathering is
about to start—wait, you're not changed yet?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh? Deary me, is it already time?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There you go, spacing out again. I bet you
haven't even decided on a resolution to write.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ...A resolution?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We're writing our resolutions to display for the
New Year's gathering held at the Mejio estate!
We do this every year...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it must have slipped my mind. Hmm... now
what should my goal be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best to think of something in time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Are you sure that's something you can manage?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'll do whatever it takes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wow, challenging yourself where you're
weakest...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Maybe I should change my resolution.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I have to return home. And I'm in such a hurry
because I can't be late. Apologies for bumping
into you like that.
choice_data_list: It's okay, don't worry about it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Why, you're so kind! Please contact me if you
start to feel any pain.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Bright, any more chit-chat and you'll be late.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're right. I'll have to take my leave now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...If you'll excuse us.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Dober... do you really think that was a proper
goodbye?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...G-good... day to you...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...G-good day to you. I'm sorry to have to cut
your conversation short.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Good day, Trainer.
